4 Micro-Cache Network
The asset maintains a network of 19 micro-caches distributed across the Andean cordillera:
9 caches in Chile (Atacama 3, central Chile 4, Patagonia 2)
4 caches in Argentina (Mendoza Province 2, Salta 1, Neuquén 1)
3 caches in Bolivia (La Paz 1, Potosí 1, Oruro 1)
2 caches in Peru (Cuzco 1, Arequipa 1)
1 cache in Ecuador (Cuenca)
Standard cache contents (PAMC Logistics Form MC-04):
Item Quantity
Tungsten throwing batons (replacement)2
Calexin-7 dose 4 blisters (8 doses)
Bofedal-3 electrolyte concentrate4 packets
Trauma medical kit (compact)1
Local currency $400 equivalent
Yatiri-2 backup handset 1
Identity package 1
Cache locations are rotated every 36 months; current placements were finalized in 2024 and will be
reviewed in 2027
